name: X-Golf Portland
about: X-Golf Portland is an indoor golf entertainment facility featuring state-of-the-art golf simulators, a sports bar, and event space. Located in downtown Portland near Old Port, the venue enables year-round golfing with a focus on play, training, and social entertainment. The facility operates on a per-bay-hour pricing model, requiring advance tee times for guaranteed simulator access. Golfers can choose from 50 world-renowned courses, including those on the PGA Tour, and can utilize the virtual driving range and on-staff PGA Professional for training purposes.
why_golfers_like_it: 98% accurate shot tracking and flight simulation
50 world-renowned courses available, including PGA Tour venues
On-site PGA Professional for lessons and training
Flexible pricing charged by the hour, not per person
Full bar and food service available for a complete entertainment experience

food_and_drink.notes: Kitchen and food service available. Guests can enjoy food and beverages without needing to golf.
Full bar service available. Happy Monday-Thursday 3pm-6pm with $1 off all drinks.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulators with 98% accuracy in shot tracking and flight

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided or if you must bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answers: The venue has a full kitchen and bar, so bringing outside food and drinks is likely not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answers: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for playing 18 holes.

faq.question: Is X-Golf Portland kid-friendly?
faq.answers: Yes, the venue welcomes families and does not require patrons to be golfing to enjoy the food, beverage, and atmosphere.
